heading: Laundry and dry cleaning services: procurement from facilities operated by the Navy Resale and Services Support Office
label: 2423 Laundry and dry cleaning services: procurement from facilities operated by the Navy Resale and Services Support Office

children.heading: .—Authority
children.label: a .—Authority
children.text: The Secretary of Defense may authorize an element of the Department of Defense to enter into a contract (through the use of procedures other than competitive procedures) with a laundry and dry cleaning facility operated by the Navy Resale and Services Support Office to procure laundry and dry cleaning services for the armed forces outside the United States.

children.heading: .—Application
children.label: b .—Application
children.text: Subsection (a) shall apply only with respect to a laundry and dry cleaning facility of the Navy Resale and Services Support Office that began operating before .October 1, 1989
